scripts.typecheck: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); function walk(dir){ return fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap((entry)=>{ const full=path.join(dir,entry.name); return entry.isDirectory()?walk(full):entry.name.endsWith('.mjs')?[full]:[]; }); } for (const file of walk('src')) { const result=spawnSync(process.execPath,['--check',file],{stdio:'inherit'}); if (result.status) process.exit(result.status); }"
